visa_types.name: Non-Family Visit
visa_types.documents_required:
Checklist:
Business Checklist
Cultural Visits, Sports Events, Conference
Fee: 
From the 01 July 2019, you must fill in your visa application and pay the application fee online using https://applyvisa.um.dk/ (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage/)
After you have applied and paid the visa fee online, you must print the cover letter from ApplyVisa and hand in supporting documents at the Visa Application Centre.
Travel Medical Insurance:
At the time of submission, the applicant must provide a Travel Medical Insurance with a colour copy valid for the Schengen area and Lichtenstein and covering the entire stay. The applicant must present
                                                            the original policy with a copy. The insurance policy must have a minimum coverage of EUR 30.000 and must cover: Repatriation for medical reasons, urgent medical care, urgent treatment in hospital
                                                            and in case of death, repatriation of the corpse. 
Iranian  Travel Medical Insurance companies which have permission to issues travel medical insurances for Schengen areas.

                                                            The original insurance policy must be presented at the port of entry. Lack of a valid Travel Medical Insurance Policy upon arrival may lead to rejection at the border.
visa_types.visa_fees:
Applicants applying at Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of Euro 19 in addition.

[Table:    Non-Family Visit]
Please Note: 
- From the 01 July 2019, you must fill in your visa application and pay the application fee online using
https://applyvisa.um.dk/ (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage)
- After you have applied and paid the visa fee online, you must print the cover letter from ApplyVisa and hand in supporting documents at the Visa Application Centre.
- The service charge is non-refundable in all cases and payable only in cash.
Children below the age of 6 years on the date of submission at VFS are exempted of the Visa Fee. However, the VFS Global service charge will be applicable.
Applicants are requested to carry exact change in Euros to pay the fees for services used at the Visa Application Centre.
visa_types.processing_time: Please visit the Embassy’s website https://iran.um.dk/  (https://iran.um.dk/)for more information on this.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa is granted for a travel period of less than 90 days.
This can include, Business travel, attending conferences, tourism, cultural visit and travel purposes that are less than 90 days.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa is granted for a travel period of less than 90 days.
This can include, Business travel, attending conferences, tourism, cultural visit and travel purposes that are less than 90 days.

## Visa Fees
Applicants applying at Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of Euro 19 in addition.

[Table:    Non-Family Visit]
Please Note: 
- From the 01 July 2019, you must fill in your visa application and pay the application fee online using
https://applyvisa.um.dk/ (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage)
- After you have applied and paid the visa fee online, you must print the cover letter from ApplyVisa and hand in supporting documents at the Visa Application Centre.
- The service charge is non-refundable in all cases and payable only in cash.
Children below the age of 6 years on the date of submission at VFS are exempted of the Visa Fee. However, the VFS Global service charge will be applicable.
Applicants are requested to carry exact change in Euros to pay the fees for services used at the Visa Application Centre.

## Documents Required
Checklist:
Business Checklist
Cultural Visits, Sports Events, Conference
Fee: 
From the 01 July 2019, you must fill in your visa application and pay the application fee online using https://applyvisa.um.dk/ (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage/)
After you have applied and paid the visa fee online, you must print the cover letter from ApplyVisa and hand in supporting documents at the Visa Application Centre.
Travel Medical Insurance:
At the time of submission, the applicant must provide a Travel Medical Insurance with a colour copy valid for the Schengen area and Lichtenstein and covering the entire stay. The applicant must present
                                                            the original policy with a copy. The insurance policy must have a minimum coverage of EUR 30.000 and must cover: Repatriation for medical reasons, urgent medical care, urgent treatment in hospital
                                                            and in case of death, repatriation of the corpse. 
Iranian  Travel Medical Insurance companies which have permission to issues travel medical insurances for Schengen areas.

                                                            The original insurance policy must be presented at the port of entry. Lack of a valid Travel Medical Insurance Policy upon arrival may lead to rejection at the border.

visa_types.name: Long Term Stay
visa_types.overview:
For Detailed information about residence and work permits to Denmark, visit the            
Danish Immigration Service website. (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB)
Please notice that a fee has to be paid to the Danish Immigration Service prior to applying. The fees can be found  here. (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/Words-and-concepts/F%C3%A6lles/Fees/Fee-%E2%80%93-Who-must-pay-a-fee') Please make sure to pay the EXACT stated amount.
Important: Please note that if you have submitted your application directly to DIS to process your application, you will have to provide the case ID number of the payment made.
DIS will not be able to process your application if you do not provide the above mentioned information.
visa_types.full_text:
For Detailed information about residence and work permits to Denmark, visit the            
Danish Immigration Service website. (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB)
Please notice that a fee has to be paid to the Danish Immigration Service prior to applying. The fees can be found  here. (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/Words-and-concepts/F%C3%A6lles/Fees/Fee-%E2%80%93-Who-must-pay-a-fee') Please make sure to pay the EXACT stated amount.
Important: Please note that if you have submitted your application directly to DIS to process your application, you will have to provide the case ID number of the payment made.
DIS will not be able to process your application if you do not provide the above mentioned information.

visa_types.name: Residence Permit
visa_types.documents_required:
For more information on documents required for a residence permit, 
click here
visa_types.visa_fees:
It is mandatory to pay the fee online from 01 July 2019 using  https://dys.um.dk/permit/ (https://dys.um.dk/permit/)

[Table:    Residence Permit ]
Applicants applying at Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of Euro 19 in addition.
In addition to the mention visa Fee you have to pay to the Danish Immigration Service prior to applying. The fees can be found here . (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-want-to-apply/Permanent-residence-permit/Permanent-residence) Please make sure to pay the EXACT stated amount.
Applicants are requested to carry exact change in Euros to pay the fees for services used at the Visa Application Centre.
visa_types.processing_time: For more information, please consult the visit the Danish Immigration Service  (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB)website
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa applies to those who intend to stay in Denmark for longer than 90 days for either residency or work permit purposes. Please note that appointment is required for resident
                                                                            permit applicants. 
 For more information  click here. (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-want-to-apply/Permanent-residence-permit)
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa applies to those who intend to stay in Denmark for longer than 90 days for either residency or work permit purposes. Please note that appointment is required for resident
                                                                            permit applicants. 
 For more information  click here. (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-want-to-apply/Permanent-residence-permit)

## Visa Fees
It is mandatory to pay the fee online from 01 July 2019 using  https://dys.um.dk/permit/ (https://dys.um.dk/permit/)

[Table:    Residence Permit ]
Applicants applying at Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of Euro 19 in addition.
In addition to the mention visa Fee you have to pay to the Danish Immigration Service prior to applying. The fees can be found here . (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-want-to-apply/Permanent-residence-permit/Permanent-residence) Please make sure to pay the EXACT stated amount.
Applicants are requested to carry exact change in Euros to pay the fees for services used at the Visa Application Centre.

## Documents Required
For more information on documents required for a residence permit, 
click here

## Photo Specifications

[Table:    Residence Permit ]

[Table:    Residence Permit ]

[Table:    Residence Permit ]

[Table:    Residence Permit ]

## Processing Time
For more information, please consult the visit the Danish Immigration Service  (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB)website

## Download Form
To download the application form for a residence permit, click here (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-want-to-apply/Permanent-residence-permit/Permanent-residence?anchor=howtoapply)
It is mandatory to pay the fee online from 01 July 2019 using        https://dys.um.dk/permit/ (https://dys.um.dk/permit/)

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Application is applicable in case you are travelling to visit relatives and friends in Denmark. This visa is granted for a travel period of less than 90 days.
For apply visa under EU regulations, please click here. (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-want-to-apply/Short-stay-visa/Visa-after-the-EU-rules)
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Application is applicable in case you are travelling to visit relatives and friends in Denmark. This visa is granted for a travel period of less than 90 days.
For apply visa under EU regulations, please click here. (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB/You-want-to-apply/Short-stay-visa/Visa-after-the-EU-rules)

## Visa Fees
Applicants applying at Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of Euro 19.

[Table:    Family Visit]
Please Note: 
- From the 01 July 2019, you must fill in your visa application and pay the application fee online using
https://applyvisa.um.dk/ (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage)
- After you have applied and paid the visa fee online, you must print the cover letter from ApplyVisa and hand in supporting documents at the Visa Application Centre.
- The service charge is non-refundable in all cases and only payable in cash.
Children below the age of 6 years on the date of submission at VFS are exempted of the Visa Fee. However, the VFS Global service charge will be applicable.
Applicants are requested to carry exact change in Euros to pay the fees for services used at the Visa Application Centre.

## Documents Required
Visiting Family and Friend

																		Travel Medical Insurance:
																		

																		At the time of submission, the applicant must provide a Travel Medical Insurance with a colour copy valid for the Schengen area and Lichtenstein and covering the entire stay. The applicant must present the original policy with a copy. The insurance policy must have a minimum coverage of EUR 30.000 and must cover: Repatriation for medical reasons, urgent medical care, urgent treatment in hospital and in case of death, repatriation of the corpse.
																		
Iranian Travel Medical Insurance compnies which have permission to issues travel medical insurances for Schengen areas.
																		

																		The original insurance policy must be presented at the port of entry. Lack of a valid Travel Medical Insurance Policy upon arrival may lead to rejection at the border.
																		
Fee: 
From the 01 July 2019, you must fill in your visa application and pay the application fee online using https://applyvisa.um.dk/ (https://applyvisa.um.dk/NVP.App/frontpage). 
After you have applied and paid the visa fee online, you must print the cover letter from ApplyVisa and hand in supporting documents at the Visa Application Centre.

visa_types.name: Short Term Stay
visa_types.overview:
(For a maximum stay of 90 days per 6 months)
If you wish to visit Denmark for a short period of time, you must obtain a visa prior to your arrival if you come from a country listed          here. (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB)
Short Stay visas allow the holder to transit through or remain in Schengen States for a maximum period of three months (90 days) within a period of six months (180 days) from the entry date into
                                                            the Schengen Area.
visa_types.full_text:
(For a maximum stay of 90 days per 6 months)
If you wish to visit Denmark for a short period of time, you must obtain a visa prior to your arrival if you come from a country listed          here. (https://www.nyidanmark.dk/en-GB)
Short Stay visas allow the holder to transit through or remain in Schengen States for a maximum period of three months (90 days) within a period of six months (180 days) from the entry date into
                                                            the Schengen Area.
